# Theatrelog

> Surgical operation logbook PWA for UK doctors building ARCP portfolios. Offline-first with cloud sync.

Theatrelog is a free progressive web app (PWA) for UK surgical trainees and doctors to log operative cases in the operating theatre — even without internet connectivity. Cases sync to the cloud when online and can be used to generate ARCP-ready portfolio summaries.

## Key features

- Offline-first case logging with IndexedDB storage
- Cloud sync via Firebase Firestore
- ARCP portfolio summary generation
- 187 default surgical procedures with custom procedure support
- Supports UK trainee grades (F1–Consultant)
- GDPR-compliant with right to erasure

## Target users

UK surgical trainees (FY1–ST8), SAS doctors, and consultants building ARCP portfolios.

## Links

- App: https://theatrelog.uk
- Privacy Policy: https://theatrelog.uk/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://theatrelog.uk/terms
